preflight_failure: governance-mutation-authorization.yml PREFLIGHT was blocked by HTTP 403 on MINDSHIFT_WORKER_URL. This version of the workflow has been replaced with a LOCAL_DETERMINISTIC model that removes the external Worker dependency entirely. Future GMA artifacts on this repo will use issuance_method: LOCAL_DETERMINISTIC.
what_this_gma_proves: governed_files_hash binds this artifact to the exact SHA-256 content of 11 governed files at commit time. Binding is repo-verifiable without any external call.
what_this_gma_does_not_prove: Canonical runtime lifecycle execution. decision_id, continuity_id, session_id, and validated_object_hash are synthesized — not produced by /session, /continuity, /authority, or /compile endpoints. No /execute proof exists.
external_blocker: MINDSHIFT_WORKER_URL / MINDSHIFT_API_KEY authorization failure. Restore secrets and extend governance-mutation-authorization.yml with optional lifecycle call to replace synthesized lineage with canonical runtime lineage post-V1.
intent: ContinuityOS v1 closure reconciliation (#1833, #1837, #1846, #1848): governance binding, canonical source declaration, constitutional guard invariants, reviewer validation. Also retires external Worker dependency from governance-mutation-authorization.yml (#1883 partial closure) — replaces with LOCAL_DETERMINISTIC model. Adds MANUAL_GMA_CONTAINMENT class to GOVERNANCE_MUTATION_CAPABILITY_MATRIX.
